summary: M2-T003 ACCEPTED (26th): contract 1.2.0 canonical (builder declares 1.2.0, enum read live from schema, declared-vs-emitted check, bounded unsupported-version error, pair-matrix enforcement, stdlib TS typegen + CI drift check, 500+no_match client fixture).
